title: Gold gains amid dovish tones from Fed
section_path: Gold gains amid dovish tones from Fed
section_path_text: Gold gains amid dovish tones from Fed
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
The prospect of an end to the tightening cycle boosted sentiment across commodity markets. This was supported by a weaker USD. Image reference: 1679521457487.png | assets/2023-03-23_gold-gains-amid-dovish-tones-from-fed_img_1679521457487_86e2116ff388.png
Crude oil gained early in the session after positive signs of demand.
